termsLegal.title: Terms of Service
termsLegal.legalNotice: This page currently contains the official Japanese legal text.
termsLegal.englishSummaryBody1: This page currently publishes the official Japanese legal text.
termsLegal.englishSummaryBody2: If you need an English explanation for practical use, please contact us.
termsLegal.englishSummaryBody3: In case of discrepancy, the Japanese text takes precedence.

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.body1: These Terms of Service ("Terms") set forth the conditions for using the applications and related services provided by Tabidea (the "Service"). All users of the Service are required to use the Service only after agreeing to these Terms. If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not use the Service.
section1.body2WithLinks: In addition, when using the Service, the <privacy></privacy>, <cookie></cookie>, and <ai></ai> (collectively, the "Policies") also apply.

section2.title: 2. Purpose and Nature of the Service
section2.intro: The Service uses artificial intelligence (AI) technology to suggest travel plans, search information, and organize information.

infoOnly.label: Information-only service:
infoOnly.body: The Service is not a travel agency. We do not arrange travel (including bookings or contracts for flights, accommodations, tours, or transportation).

aiNature.label: Nature of AI-generated information:
aiNature.body: Travel plans and related information are inferential outputs generated by AI based on learned patterns and data, and we do not guarantee their accuracy, completeness, or feasibility.

section3.title: 3. Intellectual Property Rights
section3.body1: All copyrights, trademarks, patents, and other intellectual property rights related to text, images, programs, code, design, and all other content included in the Service ("Content") belong to the Service or rightful licensors.
section3.body2: Users may not reproduce, republish, modify, distribute, publicly transmit, or otherwise make secondary use of the Content without prior written consent of the Service, except where explicitly permitted by the Service (such as social sharing features).

section4.title: 4. User Registration (Account)
section4.intro: Users may register an account by methods specified by the Service (such as Google sign-in).

management.label: Account management:
management.body: Users are responsible for managing their Google account and login credentials. Actions performed through a registered account are deemed actions of the account holder.

transferBan.label: No transfer of account:
transferBan.body: Users may not transfer, lend, or share their account with third parties.

deletion.label: Account suspension/deletion:
deletion.body: If a user violates these Terms or does not use the Service for an extended period, the Service may suspend or delete the account without prior notice.

section5.title: 5. Prohibited Conduct
section5.intro: Users must not engage in any of the following when using the Service:

items.item1: Acts that violate laws or public order and morals, or may do so
items.item3: Acts that destroy or interfere with server/network functions of the Service (including DoS attacks and excessive access)
items.item4: Unauthorized access to the Service systems, or attempts thereof
items.item5: Collecting or storing personal information of other users
items.item6: Unauthorized use of IDs or passwords of other users
items.item8: Providing benefits directly or indirectly to anti-social forces in connection with the Service
items.item9: Commercial use of Service information by methods not permitted by the Service
items.item10: Accessing Service information via scraping, crawling, or other automated means
items.item11: Any other acts deemed inappropriate by the Service

section6.title: 6. Disclaimer (Important)
section6.intro: The Service makes no express or implied warranties to users regarding reliability, accuracy, legality, usefulness, or non-infringement of third-party rights in relation to the Service.
section6.disclaimerTitle: The Service assumes no responsibility for any of the following:

aiErrors.label: Errors in AI-generated information:
aiErrors.body: Please verify feasibility of AI-proposed plans (including opening hours, prices, travel times, and facility availability) using primary official sources.

travelIssues.label: Troubles during travel:
travelIssues.body: Any accidents, injuries, illnesses, theft, loss, booking failures, increased costs, or other damages arising from use of Service information.

linkedTransactions.label: Transactions on linked sites:
linkedTransactions.body: Disputes related to purchases or services on external websites linked from the Service (including booking/affiliate sites). Such matters must be resolved between users and those external operators.

systemFailure.label: System failures and data loss:
systemFailure.body: Damages caused by service stoppage, interruption, delay, or data loss due to communication failures, maintenance, cyberattacks, or similar events. Completeness of backups for saved user data is not guaranteed.

section6.conclusion: In any case, the Service is exempt from liability for damages to users except where caused by intentional misconduct or gross negligence by the Service. Even where liability applies, it is limited to ordinary, direct, and actual damages.

section7.title: 7. Paid Services and Subscriptions
section7.intro: The Service offers paid plans for certain features.

pricing.label: Pricing plans:
pricing.body: The Service provides Free, Pro (monthly subscription), Premium (monthly subscription), and ticket-based plans. See the pricing page for details.

payment.label: Payment:
payment.body: Credit card payments are processed through Stripe. The Service does not directly store or manage users’ credit card information.

renewal.label: Subscription renewal:
renewal.body: Subscriptions (Pro/Premium) renew automatically every month on the same date unless canceled.

cancellation.label: Cancellation:
cancellation.body: Subscriptions can be canceled at any time. After cancellation, paid features remain available until the end of the current billing period.

refund.label: Refunds:
refund.body: Due to the nature of digital services, refunds for user convenience are generally not available. Refunds are provided only where legally required or in cases defined by these Terms and legal disclosure (for example, prolonged outages attributable to the Service).

section7.outroWithSpecifiedLink: For details on paid services, please see <specified></specified>.

section8.title: 8. Affiliates and Advertising
section8.body: The Service may include affiliate links and advertisements. If you purchase products or services through such links, the Service may receive compensation. Products and services are provided by affiliate partners and are not managed or sold by the Service.

section9.title: 9. Changes to the Service
section9.body: The Service may change content of the Service or discontinue provision without prior notice to users, and shall bear no responsibility for damages incurred by users as a result.

section10.title: 10. Changes to the Terms
section10.body: The Service may revise these Terms at any time without notifying users when deemed necessary. Revised Terms become effective when posted on the Service. If a user starts using the Service after changes are posted, the user is deemed to have agreed to the revised Terms.

section11.title: 11. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
section11.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Japan. Any disputes related to the Service shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the district court with jurisdiction over the Service operator’s location (Tokyo District Court).

privacyLegal.title: Privacy Policy
privacyLegal.legalNotice: This page currently contains the official Japanese legal text.
privacyLegal.englishSummaryBody1: This page currently publishes the official Japanese legal text.
privacyLegal.englishSummaryBody2: If you need an English explanation for practical use, please contact us.
privacyLegal.englishSummaryBody3: In case of discrepancy, the Japanese text takes precedence.

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.body: Tabidea (the "Service") establishes this Privacy Policy (the "Policy") regarding the handling of users’ personal information in the applications and related services provided by the Service. The Service recognizes the importance of personal information protection and strives to comply with applicable laws, including Japan's Act on the Protection of Personal Information.

section2.title: 2. Information We Collect
section2.intro: The Service may collect the following information to provide the Service.

account.label: Account information (at login):
account.body: Basic Google account information (such as email address, user ID, and profile image).

items.tripInfo: Travel planning information (such as destination, schedule, budget, companions, interests, and other preferences).
items.contactInfo: Contact information provided when making inquiries (such as email address and name).
items.feedback: Information voluntarily provided through feedback or survey responses.

autoCollected.title: 2-2. Information Automatically Collected During Service Use

items.device: Device information (such as device type, OS version, and model).
items.log: Log information (such as access time, IP address, browser type, and referrer information).
items.cookie: Identifiers using cookies and similar technologies.
items.location: Location information (only when permitted by the user).

section3.title: 3. Purposes of Use
section3.intro: The Service uses collected information for the following purposes.

authentication.label: User authentication and management:
authentication.body: To provide login features, verify identity, and save settings.

operations.label: Service provision and operation:
operations.body: To provide AI-generated travel plan creation, suggestions, storage, and sharing features.

improvement.label: Service improvement and development:
improvement.body: To analyze usage, improve AI model quality, and plan/develop new features.

support.label: User support:
support.body: To respond to inquiries and investigate/fix issues.

security.label: Security management:
security.body: To prevent and respond to unauthorized access, spam, and Terms violations.

notifications.label: Service notices and updates:
notifications.body: To provide important notices, terms updates, and feature update information.

other.label: Other:
other.body: For operations ancillary to the purposes above.

section4.title: 4. Provision to Third Parties
section4.intro: The Service does not provide personal information to third parties without user consent except in the following cases.

items.item2: When necessary to protect life, body, or property and obtaining consent is difficult.
items.item3: When particularly necessary for improving public health or promoting sound child development and obtaining consent is difficult.
items.item4: When cooperation is necessary for a national/local government body (or its delegate) to perform legally prescribed duties and obtaining consent could impede that performance.

merger.label: In case of business succession (such as merger):
merger.body: When personal information is provided in connection with business succession due to merger, company split, business transfer, or similar reasons.

section5.title: 5. Outsourcing and External Services
section5.intro: The Service may outsource all or part of personal information handling or use external services to the extent necessary to achieve the purposes of use.

ai.title: 5-1. AI Service Providers
ai.bodyWithLink: For travel plan generation, the Service primarily uses generative AI services provided by Google LLC (Gemini API), and may also use generative AI services provided by OpenAI, L.L.C. (OpenAI API) for some plans/features. User input is processed under each provider's privacy terms and, in principle, under contractual conditions that do not use user data for AI training. See the <aiPolicy></aiPolicy> for details.

analytics.title: 5-2. Analytics Tools
analytics.body: The Service uses Google Analytics. These tools collect traffic data via cookies and similar technologies but do not include personally identifying information. Collected data is managed in accordance with Google’s privacy policy.

payment.title: 5-3. Payment Service Provider
payment.body: The Service uses Stripe for payment processing of paid services. Credit card information is not stored on Service servers and is processed in Stripe’s secure environment. Stripe complies with international security standards (PCI DSS).

affiliate.title: 5-4. Affiliate Programs
affiliate.body: The Service may display referral links through affiliate programs. When purchases are made through such links, third parties may collect information using cookies and related technologies.

section5.cookieNoticeWithLink: For details on cookie purposes, disabling (opt-out), and related matters, please refer to the <cookiePolicy></cookiePolicy>.

section6.title: 6. Management and Security of Personal Information
section6.intro: The Service implements necessary and appropriate measures to prevent leakage, loss, or damage of personal information and otherwise ensure secure management. We also provide necessary and appropriate supervision over employees and contractors handling personal information (if any).

encryption.title: 6-1. Data Encryption
encryption.body: Information such as user travel plans stored in the database is protected using encryption technologies.

adminAccess.title: 6-2. Administrator Access Privileges
adminAccess.body: For maintenance and troubleshooting, system administrators may technically be able to view database information. However, except with prior user consent, when required by law, or when justified for investigating critical service issues, administrators do not view users’ personal saved plan content.

section7.title: 7. User Rights (Disclosure, Correction, Suspension, etc.)
section7.body: Users may request disclosure, correction, addition, deletion, suspension of use, or erasure of their personal information held by the Service. After confirming the request is made by the user, the Service will respond without undue delay in accordance with applicable laws. This does not apply where the Service has no legal obligation to respond under applicable laws.

section8.title: 8. Secrecy of Communications
section8.body: The Service protects the secrecy of user communications in accordance with Japan’s Telecommunications Business Act. However, this does not apply where compulsory legal procedures are carried out or in cases corresponding to justifiable defense or emergency evacuation.

section9.title: 9. Changes to This Privacy Policy
section9.body: The Service may change this Policy when deemed necessary. When changes are made, the effective date and content will be announced in an appropriate place within the Service. The revised Policy becomes effective at the time it is posted.

section10.title: 10. Contact
section10.body: For questions or opinions about this Policy, or requests related to personal information disclosure, please contact us via the Service contact page or designated contact methods.

cookiePolicyLegal.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicyLegal.legalNotice: This page currently contains the official Japanese legal text.
cookiePolicyLegal.englishSummaryBody1: This page currently publishes the official Japanese legal text.
cookiePolicyLegal.englishSummaryBody2: If you need an English explanation for practical use, please contact us.
cookiePolicyLegal.englishSummaryBody3: In case of discrepancy, the Japanese text takes precedence.

section1.title: 1. What Cookies Are
section1.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your computer or smartphone when you browse a website. They help make repeat visits more convenient and support analysis of usage patterns to improve our services.

section2.title: 2. Purposes of Cookie Use
section2.intro: We use cookies for the following purposes:

convenience.label: Improving convenience:
convenience.body: To remember your settings (such as language preferences and temporary input state) and reduce repetitive entry.

analytics.label: Analytics:
analytics.body: To understand usage (such as visits and viewed pages) through tools like Google Analytics and improve our services.

security.label: Security and abuse prevention:
security.body: To detect and prevent unauthorized access or misuse.

section2.notice: If we introduce cookies for behavioral targeting ads, we will provide prior notice in this policy.

section3.title: 3. Use of Google Analytics
section3.body1: We use Google Analytics, an access analysis tool provided by Google. Google Analytics uses cookies to collect data, and this data is collected anonymously and does not identify individuals.
section3.body2: Data collected by Google Analytics is managed in accordance with Google's privacy policy. Please refer to the pages below for details.
section3.partnerSitesLinkLabel: How Google uses information from sites or apps that use our services

section4.title: 4. Disabling Cookies (Opt-out)
section4.body: You can refuse (disable) cookies by changing your browser settings. Please note that disabling cookies may prevent some features of the Service from functioning properly.
section4.browserSettingsBody: Please refer to the following support pages for major browsers.
section4.googleOptOutBody: If you only want to disable data collection by Google Analytics, use the Google Analytics Opt-out Add-on provided by Google.

section5.title: 5. Contact
section5.bodyWithContact: For inquiries about this Cookie Policy, please contact us via the <contact></contact>.

specifiedLegal.title: Legal Disclosure
specifiedLegal.legalNotice: This page currently contains the official Japanese legal text.
specifiedLegal.englishSummaryBody1: This page currently publishes the official Japanese legal text.
specifiedLegal.englishSummaryBody2: If you need an English explanation for practical use, please contact us.

rows.addressValue: Disclosed without delay upon lawful request.
rows.phoneNote: Phone calls may not always connect. Thank you for your understanding.
rows.salesAndFeesLine1: Prices shown on sales and checkout pages include applicable tax and fees.
rows.salesAndFeesLine2: Internet communication charges required to use this service are borne by the customer.
rows.salesAndFeesLine3: No shipping or return shipping fees apply because this is a digital service.
rows.deliveryTimingValue: Service becomes available immediately after payment confirmation.
rows.paymentMethodValue: Credit card or other methods specified by us (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Stripe Link).
rows.paymentTimingLine1: Subscriptions (Pro/Premium) are prepaid. The first charge occurs at purchase and renews monthly on the same date (or month-end when unavailable).
rows.paymentTimingLine2: Pack-based purchases are charged in full at checkout.
rows.paymentTimingLine3: Billing timing from your card issuer follows your agreement with that issuer.
rows.refundLine1: Due to the nature of digital services, refunds/cancellations for customer convenience are generally not accepted.
rows.refundLine2: Refunds are provided only where required by law or when defined in our terms (for example, long service outages caused by us).
rows.refundLine3: You may cancel up to 24 hours before renewal. Service remains available until the current billing period ends.
rows.environmentLine1: We recommend using the service in the following environments.
rows.environmentLine2: Please verify operation in your environment before payment.

aiPolicyLegal.title: AI Policy
aiPolicyLegal.legalNotice: This page currently contains the official Japanese legal text.
aiPolicyLegal.englishSummaryBody1: This page currently publishes the official Japanese legal text.
aiPolicyLegal.englishSummaryBody2: If you need an English explanation for practical use, please contact us.
aiPolicyLegal.englishSummaryBody3: In case of discrepancy, the Japanese text takes precedence.

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.bodyWithLinks: Tabidea (the "Service") uses advanced artificial intelligence (AI) technologies for features such as travel plan suggestions. This AI Policy defines how AI is used in the Service, how data is handled, and the nature of AI-generated content. By using the Service, users are deemed to have understood and agreed to this policy in addition to the <terms></terms> and <privacy></privacy>.

section2.title: 2. AI Technologies We Use
section2.body: The Service primarily uses the Gemini API provided by Google LLC. In addition, some plans and features may use AI models provided by OpenAI, L.L.C. (OpenAI API). User inputs such as destinations, budgets, and themes are processed by the selected AI model to generate travel plans.

section3.title: 3. Data Usage and Model Training
section3.intro: We handle user information with strict care so you can use the Service with confidence.

google.label: No training use (Google):
google.body: Input data (prompts) and generated content in this Service are handled under terms where they are not used to train Google's AI models, based on Gemini API additional terms (Paid Services).

openai.label: No training use (OpenAI):
openai.body: Input data and generated content in this Service are handled under terms where they are not used to train OpenAI's AI models, based on OpenAI Business Terms.

retention.label: Temporary data retention:
retention.body: For abuse monitoring and legal compliance, AI providers (Google/OpenAI) may temporarily retain input and output data as logs. Such data is not used for other purposes.

section3.detailsIntro: Please review the following provider terms for details:

section4.title: 4. Accuracy and Disclaimer for AI Output
section4.warningTitle: Please note the following characteristics of AI:

hallucination.label: Inaccuracy (hallucination):
hallucination.body: AI may generate plausible but incorrect information (for example: non-existent attractions, incorrect opening hours, or fictitious transport options).

staleness.label: Information staleness:
staleness.body: AI training data may have temporal limits, so the latest changes (closures, price updates, timetable revisions, etc.) may not be reflected.

bias.label: Bias:
bias.body: Biases in training data may influence generated plans.

section4.conclusion: The Service and its operator make no guarantees regarding the accuracy, completeness, usefulness, or safety of AI-generated information and assume no liability for damages arising from use of such information.

section5.title: 5. User Responsibility
section5.intro: Travel plans provided by the Service are suggestions. For actual planning, booking, and travel decisions, please do the following:

primarySources.label: Check primary sources:
primarySources.body: Always verify the latest and accurate information through official websites, guidebooks, and transportation operators.

selfDecision.label: Make your own decisions:
selfDecision.body: You are responsible for deciding whether and how to use suggested plans.

section6.title: 6. Prohibited Conduct
section6.intro: The following conduct is prohibited when using AI features:

items.item1: Attempting to generate content that violates laws
items.item2: Attempting to generate content that infringes rights or contains violent, discriminatory, or sexual content
items.item3: Intentionally placing excessive load on AI systems
items.item4: Other conduct that violates Google Prohibited Use Policy or OpenAI Usage Policies

section7.title: 7. Policy Updates
section7.body: The operator may revise this policy as AI technology evolves or the Service changes. Important updates will be announced within the Service.
